I found your Dentist Appointment (id: 5) on 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00 at Downtown Dental Clinic. Do you want me to reschedule that one?

Please tell me how you’d like it rescheduled — pick one of the options below:

- Give a new date and start time (preferred): e.g. 2024-05-22 14:00. I’ll keep the same 1-hour duration unless you tell me otherwise.
- Say “find next available morning” or “find next available afternoon” and I’ll propose a few slots.
- Give a date range and preference (e.g. “any morning next week”).

Also confirm:
- Whether to notify anyone else (currently only your email is on the event).
- If you want me to keep the same clinic/location.

Once you tell me which option you want, I’ll reschedule it.
